mapper.sql: id, batch_id, batch_no, game_id, game_name, change_type, target_table, target_id, before_snapshot, after_snapshot, reverted, revert_time, revert_by, create_time, create_by
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM gb_game_change_log WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} AND reverted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM gb_game_change_log WHERE batch_no = #{batchNo} AND reverted = 0
